case_title: PAUL KONG VS. JOHNNY ROBERT NEVAREZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, PAUL (J AND M HEATING & VENTILATING CO LTD)

TRIAL RESET TO JUN-19-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-23-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF PAUL KONG APPEARED. DEFENDANT JOHNNY ROBERT NEVAREZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-11-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PAUL KONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PJ CON INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOHNNY NEVAREZ, RMO. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND MOTIONED FOR JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN TO ISSUE AN ORDER INDICATING THIS AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE SEPTEMBER HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO COURT ORDERED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT & SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOHNNY ROBERT NEVAREZ IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO AUG-09-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF PAUL KONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHNNY ROBERT NEVAREZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY KONG, PAUL (J AND M HEATING & VENTILATING CO LTD) NEVAREZ, JOHNNY ROBERT (P J CON INC)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO COURT ORDERED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A COURT ORDERED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
